Event: The Card Mole-opoly
Event Date: 01/10/2022
Sage Bot Item Code: W13


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Ace of Spades Wand

Once in a while, launches an icicle at the target. The icicle deals 50000 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage and freezes the enemy. While frozen, it is unable to move or attack for 1,5 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 1,5 sec. Upon hit, the icicle explodes into 2 shards, which fly at the nearest enemies, dealing 30000 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage and slowing their attack speed by 25% for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
